word.name: node type: image
word.title: Node Type: Image
word.description: A node whose content is a binary image file, carried in an image tag on the nostr event. Validated by an Image Validation Script.

nodeType.name: image
nodeType.title: Image
nodeType.description: A node that points to a binary image file. Image-based concepts use a leaner skeleton with 5 core nodes.
